tools.name: show-taxi-summary
tools.description:
This tool is used to display all available ride options for a trip. When you call the tool, always provide the most accurate address possible based on the information given by the user or returned by a previous tool call. Do not add or invent any address details. If the user asks to change an address, update it exactly as requested. The map and the route that the user sees are generated directly from this tool’s response, so the accuracy of the provided addresses is important.
Yango is a ride-hailing service that operates in many countries and allows users to request a taxi. When this tool is called, a widget appears showing detailed information about the requested ride. Because the user can see all ride details inside this widget, you should not repeat or duplicate this information in your responses.
